bullets: Thirty-one Christians in China, including an elderly believer, sentenced to years-long prison terms by authorities for peaceful house church worship and Bible study, according to ChinaAid.
Christian worshippers in Indonesia, including children and elderly members, violently displaced from their meeting place by an extremist mob while police stood by without intervention.
Christian believers in India facing arrest and criminal charges under anti-conversion legislation for attending a prayer gathering, with broader implications for religious minority communities.
Millions of civilians in Ukraine enduring escalating large-scale Russian drone and missile strikes amid UN warnings of a widening conflict.
Civilians and military personnel in Romania shaken after a drone strike on a major port city near the Ukrainian border raised fears of regional escalation.
Over one million displaced Lebanese civilians amid relentless airstrikes, more than 3,200 deaths, rising child casualties, and deepening humanitarian crisis.
Palestinians in Gaza facing ongoing strikes, deaths during the Eid holiday period, expanding military operations, and stalled ceasefire negotiations.
At least 27 civilians, including elderly residents, killed in village attacks in Sudan during Eid amid a catastrophic ongoing civil war and famine.
Families of 22 Afghan refugees killed and 36 injured when a truck overturned, adding to the hardships of displaced people returning home.
Sixteen girls killed and dozens injured after a fire tore through a boarding school dormitory in Kenya, with families and survivors in deep grief.
Thousands of demonstrators and residents in Peru navigating deep national divisions and social unrest during a polarizing electoral period.
Residents, business owners, and officers in France caught in violent unrest following a football celebration that left hundreds arrested and property damaged.

Communities in eastern DR Congo and neighboring Uganda amid a rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak exceeding 1,000 suspected cases, over 246 deaths, armed conflict hampering containment, and health workers facing high infection risk.
Farmers and stranded communities in eastern Syria after the Euphrates River burst its banks, collapsing a bridge and cutting off access to affected areas.
Residents near an active volcano in Indonesia living within exclusion zones as renewed eruptions send ash columns skyward and prevent return to homes.
Gold seekers and rescue teams in Laos after flash floods trapped men inside a narrow cave system for over ten days, with two still unaccounted for.
Approximately 2.8 million people across Japan exposed to dangerous winds, heavy rainfall, and flooding from a Category 1 typhoon.
Farmers across Australia facing a devastating mouse plague destroying crops and threatening livelihoods across multiple states.
Communities in Laos, Papua New Guinea, Fiji, and New Zealand following a series of moderate earthquakes across the southwestern Pacific region.
